Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly addresses technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2), promotes entrepreneurship through "token-based fundraising" (Target 8.3), and expands access to financial services by "decentralizing capital markets" (Target 8.10).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explores improving regulation of "global financial markets" (Target 10.5) and promoting economic inclusion through "decentralizing capital markets" and examining "African stablecoins," which directly address reducing inequalities (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course includes a "Case study: Real estate tokenization," which, through fractional ownership and increased liquidity, could potentially contribute to ensuring access to affordable housing (Target 11.1).
